tone: Exclusive, high-end experience with a touch of novelty and social status
hook_formula: VIP access, members-only offers, and exclusive events to create a sense of FOMO and prestige
cta_style: Limited-time offer, exclusive invitation to create a sense of urgency and scarcity
visual_direction: High-end visuals, trendy and modern decor, influencer partnerships, and user-generated content
india_adjustment: Influencer marketing is highly effective in India, especially on Instagram and TikTok, with a focus on exclusivity and social status
source_files: Behavioral Mechanisms and Channel Effectiveness in Hospitality Marketing.md
